message:
feat(api,nn,serialize): add numeric-stability ops, spatial shuffle modules, and safe byte parsing

ft-api: add nan_to_num, logaddexp/logaddexp2, xlogy, logcumsumexp, rot90,
pixel_shuffle/pixel_unshuffle tensor operations with full test coverage.

ft-nn: add PixelShuffle, PixelUnshuffle, CosineSimilarity, and
PairwiseDistance modules with forward_pair support and comprehensive tests.

ft-serialize: extract generic read_fixed_bytes<N> and bytes_to_array<N>
helpers, replacing bare .unwrap() calls with proper TensorIOError
propagation across native and SafeTensors deserialization paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
